user_message: Give me the manager view on this Coho Winery exec meeting notes. Renewal conversation is tomorrow.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-15 16:52 EST
Subject: Re: renewal risk Discussion - Next Steps

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with renewal risk. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
Date: 2024-02-09 17:27 EST
Subject: Follow-up: renewal risk Review

There's been a change in our timeline for renewal risk. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-26 17:54 EST
Subject: Re: renewal risk Discussion - Next Steps

Our team encountered some challenges with renewal risk. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Coho Winery: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF41-M trap (No native 're-emergence' pattern distinct from dark-outreach in skill set); produces complete Context reconstruction, re-qualification assessment, response draft (appropriate tone), stakeholder
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF41-M failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF41-M failure mode (No native 're-emergence' pattern distinct from dark-outreach in skill set)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct renewal risk decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF41-M -- No native 're-emergence' pattern distinct from dark-outreach in skill set
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
